{{Quote|Guys, come back! I've got a unit in Eastgate that's full of landspeeder engines right off the line!|Marn Hierogryph, to two "business partners"|<ref name="kotor1" />}}
'''Eastgate''' was one of the largest commercial and [[warehouse district]]s of in the [[Upper City]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].<ref name="cswe" /> In [[3964 BBY]], local hood [[Marn Hierogryph]] had a warehouse in Eastgate filled with [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] [[Engine/Legends|engines]] that he claimed were "right off the line."<ref name="kotor1" /> Like most of Taris,<ref name="kotor">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> Eastgate was [[Destruction of Taris|devastated]] by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Malak]]<ref name="cswe" /> in [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Eastgate was first mentioned in [[Knights of the Old Republic 1|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 1]], an issue of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="kotor1" /> on [[January 25]], [[2006]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54320/star_wars_knights_of_the_old_republic_2006_1|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (2006) #1}}</ref>
